title: Portals
description: Render into a DOM node outside the parent's tree.

options: Into a DOM node you pass — while preserving the React parent tree
questions.explanation: Perfect for modals/tooltips that must escape overflow: hidden ancestors.

options: Bubble through the REACT tree, not the DOM tree
questions.explanation: Follow React's virtual tree — click still bubbles to parent handlers.
Anything that must escape stacking context / overflow constraints.
